title: Fortnite
html: Stub. The Epic Games battle-royale that defined teen-gaming culture in 2018–2019. First (and so far only) dated mention in 2019 08 24 bulk pencils via the "back bling" line — a Fortnite cosmetic. Significance is as a marker of Yahir's gaming-layer-of-life in 2019: the back-to-school todo list mixes school supplies, a Fortnite cosmetic, and a garage-rebuild without comment, capturing what normal looked like for the 17-year-old.
